hero.description: From finding the right advocate to your final consultation, we've streamlined the process to be fast, secure, and stress-free.

steps.title: Search & Filter
steps.description: Browse through our extensive list of verified advocates using filters.

steps.title: Book a Consultation
steps.description: Select a time slot that works for you. Our real-time scheduling system makes booking instant and easy.

steps.title: Make Payment
steps.description: Complete your secure payment to confirm your booking. We support multiple payment methods for your convenience.

steps.title: Connect Securely
steps.description: Join your video or audio consultation directly through our secure, encrypted platform.

steps.title: Rate & Review
steps.description: After your consultation, share your feedback to help others and improve our community.

clients.title: For Clients
items: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

lawyers.title: For Advocates
items: Expand your practice tailored to your schedule.
Powerful tools to manage clients and cases.

features.title: Verified Advocates
features.description: Every advocate on our platform undergoes a rigorous document verification process to ensure legitimacy.

features.title: Bank-Grade Security
features.description: Your data and consultations are encrypted with 256-bit SSL technology. Privacy is our top priority.

features.title: 24/7 Support
features.description: Our dedicated support team is available round the clock to assist you with any queries or issues.

cta.title: Ready to Solve Your Legal Matters?
cta.description: Join thousands of verified users who trust MLawyer for quick, reliable, and secure legal advice.
